name: County Pawnbrokers
description_short: County Pawnbrokers is a Catonsville, MD pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and buying services for electronics, jewelry, coins, and mobile devices.
description_long:
County Pawnbrokers operates as a traditional pawn shop located in Catonsville, Maryland, near the intersection of Baltimore National Pike and Old Frederick Road. The business has been reviewed on multiple platforms and maintains a 3.0-star rating based on customer feedback. As a pawn shop, the company provides collateral-based lending services where customers can receive immediate cash in exchange for personal items, as well as direct purchasing of merchandise.

The company accepts a wide range of merchandise categories including consumer electronics (LED/LCD TVs, gaming consoles like Xbox One and PlayStation 4/5, DVD and Blu-Ray players), jewelry items (gold, silver, rings, necklaces, bracelets, pendants, diamonds), precious metals and coins, computing devices (Apple products including iPhones, iPads, and iPods), and cameras with lenses. They also offer ancillary services such as ring sizing and jewelry cleaning. The business operates under the web domain gotgoldgetdollars.com and can be reached at (410) 788-0557.

Customer reviews highlight knowledgeable staff and fair pricing as distinguishing factors. A 2014 review noted the shop as "hands down the best pawn shop" with very helpful and knowledgeable staff. A 2018 review specifically praised team member Jeff and his team for being "extremely friendly and very fair with their prices." The business appears to stock multiple units of popular items like gaming consoles and maintains a back inventory. However, recent feedback from 2023 indicates selective purchasing practices, with staff reportedly focusing primarily on gold purchases and displaying inconsistent customer service attitudes.

The company maintains standard retail hours (Monday-Thursday and Friday 9 AM-5 PM, Saturday 9 AM-3 PM, closed Sundays) and is positioned in the mid-range price category ($$). While some customers report positive long-term relationships and repeat transactions, mixed recent reviews suggest variable service quality and potentially narrow purchasing criteria that may not accommodate all customer needs.
pros: Accepts wide variety of merchandise including electronics, jewelry, coins, and mobile devices
Staff described as knowledgeable about products being sold (per 2014 review)
Reported as offering fair pricing on collateral loans and purchases
Maintains back inventory of popular items like gaming consoles
Offers ancillary jewelry services including ring sizing and cleaning
Long customer retention with repeat clients bringing multiple items
Open six days per week with reasonable business hours
cons: Recent customer report (2023) of inconsistent service attitudes and staff giving attitude
Selective purchasing focus (recent feedback indicates emphasis on gold only, rejecting other items)
Mixed review ratings (2 five-star and 2 one-star reviews suggest highly variable experiences)
Limited hours on Saturday (3 PM closing) and closed Sundays
No clear information about loan terms, interest rates, or repayment policies
Older positive reviews (2014, 2018) suggest possible service quality decline
best_for: Customers with electronics, jewelry, coins, or mobile devices needing immediate cash
Those seeking to buy used gaming consoles, TVs, or Apple products
Jewelry sellers looking for precious metal and gold transactions
Repeat customers with long-standing relationships with the business
diagnosis: County Pawnbrokers is best suited for customers in the Catonsville area who need immediate cash against collateral or wish to sell electronics, jewelry, and precious metals. The main caveat is that recent reviews indicate selective purchasing (focus on gold) and inconsistent service quality, so customers should verify item acceptance and pricing before visiting.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on personal items
Direct purchase of electronics and gaming consoles
Sound system and speaker equipment sales
